display.purpose: Hero H1 only. Two lines max, one italic emphasis word allowed.

title.purpose: Dish names, category sub-labels, triptych step names.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav links, prices, small meta text.

shadows.name: offset-photo-shadow
shadows.purpose: Ink-tinted shadow used only where one photo is deliberately layered in front of another (Featured Dishes offset image pair). Not a general card-elevation token.

motion.name: ease-out-strong
motion.purpose: Default entrance/reveal easing for scroll reveals and hero entrance animations.

motion.name: ease-sharp-exit
motion.purpose: Faster, sharper easing for exits (e.g. mobile drawer close), asymmetric with its entrance.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered section reveals (marketing/explanatory content, not UI controls).

motion.name: duration-drawer-exit
motion.purpose: Mobile nav drawer close; intentionally faster than its own entrance.

motion.name: stagger-child
motion.purpose: Delay between cascading list items (mobile drawer links, ingredient fact grid, fermentation triptych).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default reservation/call CTA on light sections. Pill shape, tactile press feedback.
components.html: Rezervišite sto
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #8a5726; color: #fcf7f3; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 14px 28px; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #a56d33; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a56d33; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-icon { transition: transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-icon { transform: translateX(2px); }

components.name: Primary Button (on dark)
components.description: Same CTA inverted for the Oven Char footer/final-CTA block, where the terracotta-deep fill would read too dark.
components.css: .ds-btn-on-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #fcf7f3; color: #2b2018; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; padding: 14px 32px; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-on-dark:hover { background-color: rgba(252, 247, 243, 0.9); } .ds-btn-on-dark:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9945f; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-on-dark:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Desktop navbar link. Color-only hover transition, no motion.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #2b2018; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #8a5726; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a56d33; outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Image Panel
components.description: The system's signature component: a full-bleed photo in a large soft-radius container. Used for the hero image, dish photos, ingredient banners, and location photos.
components.css: .ds-image-panel { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 28px; aspect-ratio: 4 / 5; } .ds-image-panel-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }

components.name: Info Card
components.description: Bordered surface card for grouped detail content (e.g. hours/address/phone in the Location section). Flat, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-info-card { border-radius: 28px; border: 1px solid #e7ddd1; background-color: #f5ede3; padding: 32px; } .ds-info-card-label { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: #2b2018; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-info-card-value { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #6e6053; margin: 0; }

components.name: Icon + Label Row
components.description: Pairs a Phosphor-style icon with a title and description line. Used for ingredient facts and contact details. No card wrapper.
components.html:
Radno vreme

Ponedeljak - Petak: 12-23h
components.css: .ds-icon-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; } .ds-icon-row-icon { color: #a56d33; margin-top: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-icon-row-title { font-family: Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; color: #2b2018; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-icon-row-desc { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #6e6053; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Mista Osteria reads like a magazine spread built around a single subject: dough, fire, and the three days between them. The system is editorial-restrained (one accent, generous whitespace, a serif/sans pairing doing the work) but every design decision ultimately points back to the physical craft (the 72-hour fermentation, the wood oven, the Italian-sourced ingredients). Warmth comes from photography, named ingredients, and the terracotta accent, never from decoration for its own sake.

This system explicitly rejects the generic AI-marketing playbook: no purple/blue gradients, no tiny uppercase eyebrow labels stacked above every section, no identical three-card grids, no gradient text, no glassmorphism used as decoration, no hero-metric stat blocks. It also rejects both directions of restaurant cliché: no red-and-white checkered-tablecloth kitsch, and no sterile chain-restaurant polish. It should read as one real, specific, family-run place.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (terracotta) carrying warmth across the entire page, light and dark sections alike
Flat surfaces by default; depth comes from photography and whitespace, not shadows
Large soft-radius photo panels (28px) as the dominant visual device, never a grid of identical cards
A single deliberate dark inversion at the very end (final CTA + footer), not scattered dark sections
Serif display type used sparingly and always with a reason (headlines, category names), never as body text

rules.name: The One Fire Rule
rules.body: Terracotta, in one of its three depths, is the only accent color on the page. It never shares a section with a second hue.

rules.name: The Single Inversion Rule
rules.body: The page is light-themed from hero through the location section. Exactly one deliberate switch to Oven Char happens once, at the very end, and never reverts.

rules.name: The No-Mixed-Emphasis Rule
rules.body: Emphasis inside a headline is italic or bold of the same Cormorant Garamond family. Never drop a sans word into a serif headline or vice versa.

rules.name: The Zero-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: No small uppercase tracked label sits above section headlines. The headline and its one-sentence body do the introducing.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No card, button, or panel gets a resting shadow. If something needs to feel lifted, use photography, whitespace, or the offset-layering pattern, not box-shadow.

dos: Do keep the entire page on one accent hue (terracotta, in its three depths).
Do use Terracotta Deep (#8a5726), not primary Terracotta (#a56d33), for any button or small text that needs AA contrast on Flour White.
Do keep every section flat; reach for whitespace or an image panel before reaching for a shadow.
Do use the 28px-radius image panel as the default way to show a photo full-bleed.
Do give every pressable element a scale(0.97) (or 0.90 for icon buttons) press state.
Do stack section headers vertically (headline, then one-sentence body), left-aligned by default.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent hue anywhere, including the footer or hover states.
Don't add a shadow to a button, card, or navbar; the one offset-photo exception is not a precedent.
Don't stack a small uppercase tracked eyebrow label above a section headline.
Don't use identical three-card grids for menu items, ingredients, or anything else.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as decoration, or a hero-metric stat block anywhere.
Don't reach for checkered-tablecloth kitsch or sterile chain-restaurant stock photography.
Don't invert a second section to dark. Oven Char is reserved for the final CTA + footer block only.
